title: lazarum cochleare
intro: Lazarum cochleare, also known as the horned poppy, is a plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family, characterized by its distinctive horn-like seed pods and showy, fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Lazarum cochleare include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it a traditional remedy for respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lazarum cochleare include its ability to relieve congestion, soothe irritated throats, and promote a good night's sleep. Lazarum cochleare can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
